description: You are a GIS Analyst at a regional development organization. Create a thematic map service in GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, admin/Admin123!) that classifies world countries by continent. The service requires a workspace named 'regional_atlas' (URI: http://atlas.regional.example.org) containing a PostGIS datastore named 'world_geodata' (gs-postgis:5432, db: 'gis', user: 'geoserver', pass: 'geoserver123'). Publish the 'ne_countries' table as a layer named 'countries' and configure it with a default SLD style named 'continent_colors'. This style must include seven distinct classification rules—one for each continent (Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Europe, North America, Oceania, South America)—using ogc:PropertyIsEqualTo filters on the 'continent' attribute and unique PolygonSymbolizer fill colors.
